Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "HAPPYHACKER-0826" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Happy Hacker (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The BEQ $24AC instruction at $24B2 was NOP'd out to default to joystick control
